use_cases: Displaying time-series data trends and patterns in dashboards
Visualizing metrics or KPIs over time periods
Comparing multiple data series with stacked area charts
Financial data visualization for analytics platforms
User engagement or growth metrics tracking
ai_summary: A reusable area chart component built on Recharts with built-in responsive behavior and theme support for light and dark modes. The component provides a ChartContainer wrapper with context-based configuration, allowing customizable color schemes and labels through ChartConfig. It integrates seamlessly with Tailwind CSS using CSS variable theming.
